Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x77F0 "XENO-77F0" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Xeno.prg"
Metadata.Notes: The following changes were made to default to joystick control: 1. Changed the JMP ($40CE) instruction at $4049 to be JMP $0B00 instead 2. Added a routine at $0B00 which sets $4114 and $4115 to $01 (joystick for player 1 and 2) 3. The routine then performs the JMP ($40CE) instruction as per the original code to carry on the normal code flow
